sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32074" key="e(kkaidekada/ktulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑκκαιδεκα-δάκτῠλος</orth>, <sense id="n32074.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ov, sixteen fingers long, broad,</tr_> etc., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:35:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">35.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
